mapper.select: select UUID_SHORT()
select p.* from exam_paper p join course c on c.id = p.course_id where p.course_id = #{courseId} and c.teacher_id = #{teacherId} and c.status = 1 and p.status in (0,1,2) order by p.created_at desc
select * from exam_question where paper_id = #{paperId} and status = 1 order by sort_no asc, id asc
select * from exam_question where paper_id = #{paperId} and status = 1 order by sort_no asc, id asc

select o.question_id, o.opt_key, o.opt_text from exam_option o join exam_question q on q.id = o.question_id where q.paper_id = #{paperId} and q.status = 1 and o.status = 1 order by q.sort_no asc, o.sort_no asc, o.id asc

select p.*, ( select max(a.total_score) from exam_attempt a where a.paper_id = p.id and a.student_id = #{studentId} and a.status = 2 and not exists ( select 1 from exam_question q left join exam_answer ea on ea.attempt_id = a.id and ea.question_id = q.id where q.paper_id = a.paper_id and q.status = 1 and q.q_type = 5 and (ea.id is null or ea.score is null) ) ) as my_best_score from exam_paper p join course c on c.id = p.course_id join course_member cm on cm.course_id = c.id where p.course_id = #{courseId} and p.status = 1 and c.status = 1 and cm.user_id = #{studentId} and cm.member_role = 'STUDENT' and cm.status = 1 and (p.start_at is null or p.start_at <= now()) order by p.created_at desc

select p.* from exam_paper p join course c on c.id = p.course_id join course_member cm on cm.course_id = c.id where p.id = #{paperId} and p.course_id = #{courseId} and p.status = 1 and c.status = 1 and cm.user_id = #{studentId} and cm.member_role = 'STUDENT' and cm.status = 1 limit 1
mapper.insert: insert into exam_answer(id, attempt_id, question_id, answer, score) values (UUID_SHORT(), #{attemptId}, #{questionId}, #{answer}, #{score}) on duplicate key update answer = values(answer), score = values(score)
mapper.update: update exam_attempt set submitted_at = now(), objective_score = #{objectiveScore}, total_score = #{totalScore}, status = 2 where id = #{attemptId} and student_id = #{studentId} and status = 1
mapper.select: select a.id as attempt_id, a.student_id, u.username as student_username, coalesce(nullif(trim(u.real_name), ''), u.username) as student_name, a.submitted_at, a.total_score, a.objective_score, case when not exists ( select 1 from exam_question q left join exam_answer ea2 on ea2.attempt_id = a.id and ea2.question_id = q.id where q.paper_id = a.paper_id and q.status = 1 and q.q_type = 5 and (ea2.id is null or ea2.score is null) ) then 1 else 0 end as graded from exam_attempt a join exam_paper p on p.id = a.paper_id join course c on c.id = p.course_id join sys_user u on u.id = a.student_id where a.paper_id = #{paperId} and p.course_id = #{courseId} and c.teacher_id = #{teacherId} and c.status = 1 and a.status = 2 order by a.submitted_at desc, a.id desc

select q.id as question_id, q.q_type, q.stem, q.score as full_score, q.correct_answer, ea.answer as student_answer, ea.score as earned_score from exam_question q left join exam_answer ea on ea.question_id = q.id and ea.attempt_id = #{attemptId} where q.paper_id = #{paperId} and q.status = 1 order by q.sort_no asc, q.id asc
select coalesce(sum(ea.score), 0) from exam_answer ea inner join exam_question q on q.id = ea.question_id where ea.attempt_id = #{attemptId} and q.q_type is not null and q.q_type <> 5

select q.id as question_id, q.q_type, q.stem, q.score as full_score, count(distinct att.id) as participant_count, coalesce(avg(coalesce(ea.score, 0)), 0) as avg_score, sum( case when q.q_type <> 5 and coalesce(ea.score, 0) >= (q.score - 0.000001) then 1 else 0 end ) as correct_count from exam_question q left join exam_attempt att on att.paper_id = q.paper_id and att.status = 2 left join exam_answer ea on ea.attempt_id = att.id and ea.question_id = q.id where q.paper_id = #{paperId} and q.status = 1 group by q.id, q.q_type, q.stem, q.score, q.sort_no order by q.sort_no asc, q.id asc
select count(1) from exam_paper where course_id = #{courseId} and status = 1
select count(distinct a.paper_id) from exam_attempt a join exam_paper p on p.id = a.paper_id where p.course_id = #{courseId} and p.status = 1 and a.student_id = #{studentId} and a.status = 2

select max(a.total_score) from exam_attempt a where a.paper_id = #{paperId} and a.student_id = #{studentId} and a.status = 2 and not exists ( select 1 from exam_question q left join exam_answer ea on ea.attempt_id = a.id and ea.question_id = q.id where q.paper_id = a.paper_id and q.status = 1 and q.q_type = 5 and (ea.id is null or ea.score is null) )

select count(distinct a.id) from exam_attempt a join exam_paper p on p.id = a.paper_id join course c on c.id = p.course_id where a.paper_id = #{paperId} and p.course_id = #{courseId} and c.teacher_id = #{teacherId} and c.status = 1 and a.status = 2 and exists ( select 1 from exam_question q left join exam_answer ea on ea.attempt_id = a.id and ea.question_id = q.id where q.paper_id = a.paper_id and q.status = 1 and q.q_type = 5 and (ea.id is null or ea.score is null) )
